zh.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbert於1115年出生在威爾士。他和Fits Walter Lucy至少有1個兒子。他去世於1204年在他的家鄉享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbert于1115年出生在威尔士。他和Fits Walter Lucy至少有1个儿子。他去世于1204年在他的家乡享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English, and French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In Britain, this Old French name, introduced by the Normans, reinforced the less common Old English cognate Herebeorht. The surname was taken to Ireland after the Anglo-Norman invasion and in the 16th century.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Harbison
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name Herbert (the change from -er- to -ar- was a common one in Old French and Middle English). An intrusive n later gave Harbinson .

variants.name: Hebard
meanings: English (Surrey):
variant of Herbert , with assimilation of the first r. Compare Hebb .
variant of   Hibbert  .

variants.name: Harbert
meanings: German and English: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbers
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from   Herbert  . It is found mainly in Lower Saxony and across the Dutch border.

variants.name: Dickherber
meanings: Probably a nickname for a fat person by the name of Herbert , of which Herber is a short form, or, more likely, in the north from Die(c)kherber, a topographic and distinguishing name for a Herber living by the dike, see Dicke 2. Compare Dickmeyer .

variants.name: Hebert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Gaston, Alcide, Camille.
French (Hébert): assimilated form of Herbert . Compare Abair , Abar , Abare , Abear , Aber , Eber , and Ebert .
German: variant of   Heber   1.

variants.name: Herber
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbertson
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name   Herbert  .

variants.name: Hebb
meanings: English (East Yorkshire and northeast Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Hebb, Ebb, pet forms of Herbert .

variants.name: Herb
meanings: South German: nickname for a harsh or rough person, from Middle High German herb ‘tart, harsh’.
German: from the personal name Herpo, a pet form of Herbert .

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

variants.name: Heribert
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

nameMeanings.name: fits
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbert was born in 1115, in Wales. He had at least 1 son with Fits Walter Lucy. He died in 1204, in his hometown, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbert est né en 1115, à Galles. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Fits Walter Lucy. Il est décédé en 1204, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbert wurde 1115 in Wales geboren. Er hatte mit Fits Walter Lucy mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 89 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbert è nato il nel 1115 nel Galles. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Fits Walter Lucy. Morì nel 1204, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbertは1115年にウェールズで生まれた。彼はFits Walter Lucyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1204年に故郷で89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbert(은)는 1115년 웨일스에서 태어났다. 그는 Fits Walter Lucy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1204년 그의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbert nasceu em 1115, em Gales. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Fits Walter Lucy. Ele faleceu em 1204, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbert родился в 1115 г. в местности Уэльс. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Fits Walter Lucy. Он умер в 1204 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Herbert fits Herbert nació en 1115, en Gales. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Fits Walter Lucy. Murió en 1204, en su pueblo, a la edad de 89 años.
